# ToolContext.NotifyAsync method

Emits an arbitrary request-scoped notification on this request's stream (§9.6.2).

```csharp
public Task NotifyAsync(JsonRpcNotification notification)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| notification | The notification to emit. |

## Return Value

A task that completes when the notification is handed to the transport.
